warnings: Plan only targets high-leverage rows affecting AEX, PQX, EVL, TPA, CDE, SEL, REP, LIN, OBS, SLO. Other systems are intentionally not targeted.
Replacement signals are recommendations to canonical owners; MET does not adopt or run them.
failure_prevented: Stub fallback rows continuing to be reported as artifact-backed because no targeted plan named the systems and the required replacement signals.
signal_improved: Per-system fallback rows are named with current data source, replacement signal needed, and priority — no boil-the-ocean attempt.

fallback_items.replacement_signal_needed: Per-dimension replay status with source per dimension (short_horizon, long_horizon, distribution_shift).
fallback_items.failure_prevented: Replay coverage being reported as artifact-backed when only short_horizon is present.

fallback_items.current_data_source: stub_fallback (certification edge missing, replay edge not per-dimension)
fallback_items.replacement_signal_needed: Per-edge lineage status including eval_summary -> certification_evidence.
fallback_items.failure_prevented: Lineage being reported as complete when certification edge is absent.

fallback_items.replacement_signal_needed: Explicit warn-trigger fields naming partial-eval, partial-cert, partial-replay, over-budget conditions.
fallback_items.failure_prevented: Warn boundary observations being lost across loops.
fallback_items.signal_improved: TPA artifact carries explicit warn-trigger fields with source per trigger.

fallback_items.replacement_signal_needed: consumed_ratio (float|unknown) and budget_status (within|warn|over|unknown) as first-class fields.
fallback_items.failure_prevented: Reliability budget pressure being hidden during promotion review.
fallback_items.signal_improved: SLO record carries explicit budget context for CDE.

fallback_items.replacement_signal_needed: Per-system trace_completeness and metric_freshness fields with source per field.
fallback_items.failure_prevented: Observability rows being read as artifact-backed when fields are not exposed.
fallback_items.signal_improved: OBS record carries per-system trace completeness signals.

fallback_items.current_data_source: stub_fallback (pre-seed; not yet exercised on this case)
fallback_items.replacement_signal_needed: AEX execution snapshot with input_artifact and output_artifact source paths.
fallback_items.failure_prevented: Execution edge of the loop staying invisible because AEX never reports a per-case snapshot.
fallback_items.signal_improved: AEX artifact exists per case with input and output references.
